reason: Several implemented modules are absent from ARCHITECTURE.md: tunnel.js (LAN tunnel), src/cli/ (setup.js, browser.js), HTTPS/middleware layer (cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js), VAD (runtime/vad.js), and agentic-embed runtime integration (embed.js + adapters/). These are production code paths with no architectural documentation.
proposedChange: Add sections to ARCHITECTURE.md for: (1) Tunnel module — LAN tunnel via tunnel.js; (2) CLI module — src/cli/setup.js and browser.js; (3) HTTPS/Middleware layer — cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js; (4) VAD — runtime/vad.js server-side voice activity detection; (5) agentic-embed integration — embed.js and adapters/ for vector embedding runtime.
